default.content: LangChain is a framework for building applications with large language models, providing tools for chaining prompts, memory management, and agents. [1]

test123.content: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) grounds language model outputs in external knowledge retrieved at inference time, reducing hallucination [1]. This approach integrates retrieval techniques with generative models to enhance the accuracy and relevance of generated responses by leveraging external information when needed.
